component.name: File Organizer
component.summary: AI-powered local file management with privacy-first architecture

description.p: File Organizer is an AI-powered local file management system that organizes your files intelligently using local LLMs with zero cloud dependencies. Your files and data never leave your machine.

ul.li: AI-powered file categorization using local language models
Support for 48+ file types including documents, images, audio, and video
Privacy-first: 100% local processing, no cloud required
Intelligent deduplication for images and documents
PARA and Johnny Decimal organization methodologies
Undo/redo support for all file operations

description.p: Initial alpha release with full AI-powered file organization capabilities.
